title: hieracium microbauhinii
intro: Hieracium microbauhinii, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium microbauhinii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
